sections.paragraph:
f.-(I) Isa 37:27, i.q. שְׁדֵפָה 2Ki 19:26 the letters מ and פ being interchanged; see under the letter .

(II) pl. שְׁדֵמֹות constr. שַׁדְמֹות fields, Jer 31:40 2Ki 23:4, either planted with corn, Hab 3:17, or with vines, vineyards, Deu 32:32. Twice, Isa 16:8 Hab 3:17, joined with a sing. verb. This signification, although there is no trace of it in the cognate languages, is sufficiently confirmed both by the context of the passages and the authority of the ancient versions. Some have sometimes unsuitably rendered it vines.
